summary: Pipeline Page Visual Balance/Hierarchy Refinements - Iteration 277. All 12 visual changes verified: (1) School name 18px/700 weight prominent, (2) Action title 16px/500 weight softer, (3) Signal bullet spacing 6px, (4) Stage tracker with 'Pipeline stage' label and rgba(255,255,255,0.02) tinted background, (5) Section headers with count pill badges, (6) Card hover with stronger shadow + transform, (7) On Track green #357a4d verified. Desktop and mobile viewports tested successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: PipelineHero.js: School name fontSize 18px, fontWeight 700 - VERIFIED (line 104-107)
PipelineHero.js: Action title fontSize 16px, fontWeight 500, color rgba(255,255,255,0.72) - VERIFIED (line 114-117)
PipelineHero.js: Signal bullet marginBottom 6px spacing - VERIFIED (line 149)
PipelineHero.js: Stage rail 'Pipeline stage' label with rgba(255,255,255,0.02) background tint - VERIFIED (lines 214-227)
PriorityBoard.js: Section headers with count pill badges (fontSize 12px, borderRadius 5px) - VERIFIED (lines 271-279)
PriorityBoard.js: Card hover with shadowHover + translateY(-2px) transform - VERIFIED (lines 114-125)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline page visual hierarchy refinements complete. All CSS changes verified: (1) School name 18px/700 prominent, (2) Action title 16px/500 softer, (3) Signal bullets 6px spacing, (4) Stage tracker with 'Pipeline stage' label + tinted bg, (5) Section count pills, (6) Card hover effects, (7) On Track green #357a4d. No logic changes - purely visual. Pipeline/Priority toggle works. Mobile viewport renders correctly with stage rail hidden (sm:flex).

pipeline_page_loads.details: Pipeline page loads successfully after login with Priority view

hero_school_name_18px_bold.details: School name 'UCLA' displayed at 18px fontSize, 700 fontWeight - prominent

hero_action_title_lighter.details: Action title 'Review this school' at 16px fontSize, 500 fontWeight - softer than school name

hero_signal_bullets_spacing.details: 3 signal bullets with 6px marginBottom spacing between them (0px for last)

hero_stage_tracker_label_tint.details: Stage tracker visible with 'Pipeline stage' label and rgba(255,255,255,0.02) background tint

section_headers_count_pills.details: 'Needs attention now' count=3, 'On track' count=4 - pill badges visible

card_hover_interaction.details: Card hover: shadow intensifies (shadowHover), transform translateY(-2px), border-color changes

on_track_green_contrast.details: On Track header uses #357a4d (rgb(53,122,77)) - stronger green contrast

cards_clickable_navigation.details: All cards clickable and navigate to school detail page /pipeline/{program_id}

mobile_viewport.details: Hero and cards render properly at 390x844, stage rail hidden (sm:flex class)
